tasks.label: Test App
tasks.detail: Runs the normal local app. Use the master account's Act as Owner workflow to verify a franchise.

tasks.label: Test App - Staging (Recommended)
tasks.detail: Runs against the isolated staging Supabase project configured in .env.staging.local.

tasks.label: Test App - PPAS West (5555)
tasks.detail: Runs a local test build labeled for PPAS West. Sign in as master and Act as Owner for franchise 5555.

tasks.label: Test App - PPAS East (9724)
tasks.detail: Runs a local test build labeled for PPAS East. Sign in as master and Act as Owner for franchise 9724.

tasks.label: Verify Release
tasks.command: npx tsc --noEmit; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { exit $LASTEXITCODE }; npm run build:renderer
tasks.detail: Runs TypeScript and production renderer build checks without publishing anything.

tasks.label: Create Installer
tasks.detail: Creates a local Windows installer without publishing it.

tasks.label: Supabase - Login CLI
tasks.detail: Authenticates the local Supabase CLI through the browser. This does not deploy or change a project.

tasks.label: Supabase - Deploy All Edge Functions to Staging
tasks.detail: Deploys every repository Edge Function to the project in .env.staging.local after proving it differs from production. Ignores the existing CLI project link.

tasks.label: Release - One-Time Migration Bootstrap
tasks.detail: ONE TIME ONLY: verifies, creates the bridge/global build plus initial West, East, and master channels, then pushes their tags. Requires a clean committed worktree.

tasks.label: Release - PPAS West Only (5555)
tasks.detail: Verifies and publishes only the PPAS West channel plus the master channel. PPAS East does not receive this update.

tasks.label: Release - PPAS East Only (9724)
tasks.detail: Verifies and publishes only the PPAS East channel plus the master channel. PPAS West does not receive this update.

tasks.label: Release - Global (All Franchises)
tasks.detail: Verifies and publishes West, East, master, and the stable bridge. Resets every franchise release counter to 1.

tasks.label: Release - Register New Franchise Channel
tasks.detail: Adds a new franchise code to release-state.json at counter 1. Commit the resulting state before publishing.

tasks.label: Release - Selected Franchise Only
tasks.detail: Publishes only the registered franchise code entered below plus the master channel.
